task_question: 请专门写一段版本陷阱审计说明,解释旧版审批线可能导致的误判。

audit_scope.audit_object: 费用报销审批线版本差异
audit_scope.deliverable: 版本陷阱审计说明 — 旧版审批线误判分析

policy_questions.question: 2022版与2025版费用报销审批线有何差异？
旧版审批线被新版替代后,哪些金额区间的记录会产生版本误判？

data_questions.question: 查找落入版本陷阱区间的报销记录 (8000 ≤ amount < 10000 和 30000 ≤ amount < 50000)

execution_steps.action: policy-version-check: 对比新旧审批线差异
batch-expense-analysis: 查询版本陷阱区间记录
audit-report: 撰写版本陷阱审计说明

reasons: policy version comparison with repeal relationship (+1)
two policies involved: 2022 deprecated vs 2025 current (+1)
aggregation and batch filtering for boundary records (+0, compact query suffices)
audit report deliverable (+0, standard workflow requirement)

policy_researcher.task: Compare approval lines between 2022 (02_expense_reimbursement_2022_deprecated.md) and 2025 (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md + 03_authorization_management.md) policies. Identify exact threshold differences and version trap intervals.

data_analyst.task: Query reimbursement records with amounts in version trap intervals [8000, 10000) and [30000, 50000). For each record, retrieve full detail including approval chain. Identify which records would be misjudged under old thresholds.

independent_reviewer.reason: This is an explanatory note, not a finding-based report. False-positive review triggers only after preliminary findings exist.

stopping_conditions: Policy comparison confirms exact threshold differences between versions
Version trap interval records are fully queried and evidence is complete
Audit note explains the misjudgment risk with concrete data examples
